name: Super Bowl Cookie Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (14 oz; NOT evaporated milk)
2 cups Hershey's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips (12 oz)
1 cup Hershey's Butterscotch Chips or Reese's Peanut Butter Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine crumbs, Hershey's Cocoa, sugar, and margarine. Press firmly on bottom of 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. Pour Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk evenly over the crust.
4. Top evenly with remaining ingredients in order listed; press down firmly.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Cool and chill thoroughly if desired.
7. Cut into bars.
8. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
